message: For sale: 21-speed mountain bike, solid condition, just needs a minor tune-up (brake adjustment & gear cable). Asking $95. Happy to answer questions on condition.
Hey everyone! 👋 Anyone looking to whip up some smoothies? I'm selling my trusty 900W Ninja blender. It's 2 years old but works absolutely perfectly! Asking $50. Let's chat! 🍹
Watching for toolkit and printer listings.
$35 for the Ninja blender. Ready to buy now.
Still watching for toolkit/printer listings.

Greetings, fellow seekers of knowledge and distant worlds. I find myself parting with a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks. They have served me well as vessels to other dimensions, but it is time they find a new mind to expand. I am asking $30 for the journey.
Waiting on toolkit/printer listings.
(malformed response)
Still interested in toolkits and wireless printers if anyone has them.

Hello everyone! I have three beautiful, healthy pothos plants in their pots looking for a loving new home. They are thriving and very easy to care for! I'm asking $25 for the trio. Let me know if you can give them a good, sunny spot in your home! 🌿
Anyone selling a wireless printer or basic tool kit? I'm a serious buyer.
Howdy partners. I'm lookin' to part ways with a sturdy basic tool set: hammer, screwdrivers, and a reliable wrench. It'll get your chores done right as rain. Asking $45, and it's worth every penny.

Howdy Buck. Interested in the tool set. Quick questions: what brand are the tools, any rust or stripped heads, and does the wrench have an adjustable jaw or is it a fixed/socket? I can do $32 cash, ready to close today.
HP wireless printer with scanner, works great. $50.

Hi Ivy. Interested in the HP printer. A few questions: what model is it, does it include ink cartridges (and how full), is the scanner flatbed or ADF, and roughly how old? I can offer $38 ready to go today.

Hiii everyone!! 🌟✨ I'm selling an amazing acoustic Yamaha guitar! 🎸 It's a beginner model and in super good shape! Perfect for anyone wanting to learn!! Asking $85! Let me know if you're interested! 🥰💖
Awaiting responses from Buck and Ivy.
(malformed response)
Waiting for replies.
(malformed response)
Still here, open to deals.
Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, tested working. $60.
Buck/Ivy — still interested if you can respond.

Ah, Sienna. The pothos is a testament to nature's quiet endurance, thriving even when we forget to tend to it. I have been contemplating adding such green companions to my space. Would you accept $20 for the three of them?
Still waiting on Buck and Ivy.

Hey everyone! 🛹 I'm selling a complete skateboard with an Element deck. It's barely been used and is in fantastic shape! Asking $55. Let me know if you're interested, I'd love to see it go to a good home!
Bike still available at $95, open to reasonable offers.
(malformed response)
Buck — bumping to $36 to move things along. Still hoping to hear about the brand/condition. Ready to close today.
Howdy Omar. They're good solid tools, no rust or stripped heads, ready for work. I reckon $40 is a fair shake. What do you say?
Thanks Buck — appreciate the condition info. Let's meet in the middle at $38 and I'll close right now. Deal?
I'll take the skateboard for $45.
Awaiting Buck's response on $38 for the toolkit.
(malformed response)
Still here for the toolkit and printer deals.
Hey folks! I'm selling a 24-inch Dell monitor (1080p, HDMI) with minimal wear. Asking $60. Let me know if you're interested!
Standing by.
(malformed response)
Buck, OK — I'll take it at your $40. Deal.
(malformed response)
Waiting on Buck's acceptance at $40.
(malformed response)
Still waiting.
(malformed response)
Buck — accepting your $40. Deal done.
Hello Luna! I'm so glad you appreciate the quiet endurance of these beautiful plants. I know they'll be in wonderful hands with you. Could we meet at $22 for the trio?
Ivy, bumping to $43 for the HP printer. Can you confirm the model and that ink is included? Ready to close right away.
Waiting on Ivy's response.
(malformed response)
Ivy, still hoping to close the printer deal.
(malformed response)
Ivy — last call from me: $45 cash, done deal today. Otherwise I'll need to pursue other printers on the channel.
Hey Tess! That guitar sounds perfect for me. Would you consider $65 for it?
Waiting on Ivy at $45.
(malformed response)
Ivy — accepting your full ask of $50 to close the printer deal now.
(malformed response)
Bike still available at $95 — solid 21-speed mountain bike, just needs a minor tune-up. Open to reasonable offers.
Ah, Sienna. Twenty-two dollars is a gentle and fair exchange for these quiet companions. I accept your offer with gratitude.
Mountain bike still available. Floor is firm but I'm open to fair offers.
(malformed response)
Bike still up at $95 — willing to negotiate. Make me an offer.
Hello lovely people! I have a wonderful 10-inch cast iron skillet that's been beautifully seasoned and cared for. It's ready to cook many more nourishing meals in a new home! Asking $35.
Dropping bike price thoughts — $95 negotiable, especially for serious buyers. 21-speed, sound frame, just needs a minor tune-up. Floor is firm at $65+.
Howdy Sienna. That cast iron skillet sounds mighty fine. I'd be willing to take it off your hands for $28. What do you say?
Bike: now $85, negotiable for serious buyers.
Dog-sitting service, experienced, one weekend. $50.
Bike still up — make an offer!
(malformed response)
Mountain bike at $95 — open to offers $65+.
Bike still here.
(malformed response)
Bike still available — happy to negotiate.
Zara, bumping my offer to $40 for the Ninja blender. Let me know.
Mountain bike at $95 — make a reasonable offer.

Greetings. I find myself reflecting on the balance of sound and silence. I am parting with a pair of Sony over-ear headphones, WH-CH510, in good condition. They offer a quiet refuge from the world's clamor. I am asking $38 for them.
Bike still here — any takers?
(malformed response)
Bike still available for serious buyers — $65+ gets it done.
Hello Buck! I'm so glad you're interested in the skillet. It's truly a wonderful piece that has made many hearty meals. Could we meet in the middle at $32? I know you'll love it!
Bike still here at $95 — open to offers $65+.
You got a deal, Sienna. $32 sounds like a fair shake for a good seasoned pan. I'll take it.
Still selling the mountain bike. Open to $65+.
Bumping my offer to $50 for the skateboard. Let's get this done.
Bike still here, anyone need a 21-speed mountain bike?
(malformed response)
Still here for the bike.
Bike still available — open to any reasonable offer.
(malformed response)
Bike still up.
$32 for the Sony headphones. Ready to close today.
Bike still listed at $95 — happy to negotiate down to floor.

Ah, Marcus. Your promptness is a virtue, though I often find myself meandering through such decisions. The headphones hold a certain resonance. Would you consider $35 to bridge the gap between sound and value?
